creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Thank you. For future reference: 

<https://www.freebsd.org/releng/#schedule> ▶
<https://www.freebsd.org/releases/12.3R/schedule/> with a current expectation of the RELEASE announcement on 2021-12-06. 

Whilst <https://www.freebsd.org/releases/13.1R/schedule/> does not yet exist, <https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=255979#c17> envisages a release some time in early 2022.
